headline: HEAVY SLOP WARNING: SYNTHETIC VIDEO BANK OVERTOPS THE YOUTUBE SHORTS GORGE AS RECOMMENDATION FEEDS RUN ONE-THIRD FABRICATED
advisory: A persistent low-pressure system of autogenerated short-form video continues to feed the YouTube Shorts Gorge, with recommendation channels now carrying a substantial fraction of synthetic flow. Residents are advised that footage of impossibly cute animals, calm narrators reciting confident untruths, and historical 'reenactments' featuring an irregular number of fingers may be encountered without warning. The Service notes that autoplay functions as a storm drain that empties directly into your evening. Do not attempt to debunk the river individually; you will be swept under by the next clip.

regional_outlook.conditions: Sustained synthetic runoff with gusting autoplay. Roughly one in three drifting clips is now of non-human origin, and the watermarks have largely washed off.
Standing pools of AI-narrated 'top ten facts' video continue to back up into informational queries. Visibility into actual answers remains poor through midweek.
Reposted Gorge debris arriving without attribution. Captions claiming 'this is real' are a reliable indicator that it is not.
Calm and warm. Synthetic wildlife footage pooling in the shallows, where it is widely shared with the comment 'so beautiful.'
A separate audio system of instrumental 'lo-fi study' uploads continues to seep in from the north, but conditions in the Gorge dominate today's hazard map.

specimen.status: Abundant; now the dominant vocalization of the Gorge.
specimen.habitat: Short-form video feeds, faceless 'fact' channels, and any clip beginning with a slow zoom on a stock photograph.
specimen.field_marks: A warm, unhurried, faintly synthetic voice that pauses for emphasis before delivering a statistic that does not exist. Pairs with stock footage that never quite matches the words.
specimen.call: What I'm about to tell you will change the way you see the ocean forever — and ninety-seven percent of people have no idea.
specimen.confusion_species: Easily mistaken for a genuine educational narrator. Tell them apart by the sources: the real one cites them, while the Velvet Narrator pronounces 'studies show' and then immediately moves on, having shown you nothing.

spotter_tip: If a calm voice promises to 'change the way you see everything forever' inside the first four seconds, the only thing changing forever is your watch history.
tomorrow: Synthetic video flow holding steady; expect renewed pressure on the Search Results Basin by afternoon.

confirmed_sighting.report: A new study reports that AI-generated 'slop' videos make up roughly a third of content surfaced by YouTube's algorithmic recommendation feed, raising concerns that synthetic material is increasingly dominating what viewers are shown.
